title: ARE THERE ANY TAX BENEFITS INVOLVED WHILE DONATING TO BAL RAKSHA BHARAT?
description: All donations made to Bal Raksha Bharat (Save the Children India) are 50% tax-exempt under section 80G of the Income Tax Act 1961. Section 80G of the Income Tax Act allows tax exemptions for various entities, including individuals, Hindu Undivided Families (HUFs), companies, and partnership firms.
